stories.title: Lamine Yamal vs. Lionel Messi: Contender vs. legen...
stories.summary: When Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal meet in Sunday's World Cup final, will the veteran magician from Argentina retain his place as the GOAT, or will Spain's young star step up?

stories.title: Back to his Ballon d'Or-winning best, Rodri has po...
stories.summary: Other Spain players get the attention, but midfielder Rodri is the key to them stopping Lionel Messi and Argentina.

stories.title: England hold off France to win all-time WC thrille...
stories.summary: Bukayo Saka's hat trick helped England survive a dramatic second-half comeback to beat France 6-4 in Saturday's chaotic third-place playoff.

stories.title: Mbappé equals Messi's all-time WCup goal record
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé has leapfrogged Lionel Messi on the all-time World Cup goal-scoring chart as he scored his 21st and 22nd career goals in the tournament.

stories.title: Askren makes emotional return to mat after illness...
stories.summary: A year removed from double lung transplant surgery, Ben Askren returned to the wrestling mat and lost 6-3 to Belal Muhammad in the co-main event of RAF 11 in Milwaukee.
